description: Cohort-node roster extension. Galarian Slowbro V (DAA-099, Ultra Rare Holofoil, 5ban Graphics art) wires into the existing galarian-regional-forms parent-cohort node as the eighth in-corpus Galarian-variant species and the cohort's first evolved-form Ultra Rare. The node's pre-existing caveats section already listed Galarian Slowbro as a documented-but-not-yet-acquired cohort member; wave 53's CSV ingest brought the species into inventory. Particularly load-bearing for the node's Galarica-seed thesis: Slowbro V is the clearest single-card statement of the Galarica-seed dietary mechanism producing a specific anatomical-and-typing shift (tail-bite to arm-bite; Water/Psychic to Poison/Psychic), with the Rapid-Fire Poison Ability and Tripping Shot attack mechanizing the gun-arm combat concept at the rules layer.
citations: [Pokemon Sword & Shield: Isle of Armor DLC, June 2020]
